summary: WASI project audit reveals functional routing and DEX implementation but critical build failure, API routing inconsistencies, and missing ETF catalog items. Core features work but maintenance and configuration risks exist.

critical.issue: Build process fails with npm run build
critical.why: Exit code -1 indicates build configuration or dependency issues preventing production deployment
critical.fix: Investigate build logs, verify all dependencies are compatible, check Vite/build configuration

critical.issue: API routing inconsistency across multiple files
critical.why: Three different API URL resolution strategies (index.html, wasiApi.js, dexApi.js) can cause runtime errors and stale localStorage conflicts
critical.fix: Consolidate API URL resolution into a single shared utility, standardize localStorage key names

high.issue: ETF catalog count mismatch (40 vs expected 42)
high.why: DEX_SEED_TOKENS array contains only 40 ETFs but expectedFacts specifies 42, indicating missing catalog items
high.fix: Add the 2 missing ETF tokens to DEX_SEED_TOKENS array to match expected catalog size

high.issue: Incomplete form field reference in DexApp.jsx
high.why: Line 621 references 'orderFor' instead of 'orderForm' causing runtime error when placing orders
high.fix: Change 'orderFor' to 'orderForm' in the select element value attribute

high.issue: Missing error handling in dexApi.js request function
high.why: Non-JSON responses cause silent failures, no timeout handling, and generic error messages
high.fix: Add try-catch for JSON parsing, implement request timeout, improve error specificity

medium.issue: Stale localStorage URL detection logic flawed
medium.why: index.html attempts to detect banking-only URLs but regex may miss edge cases, leaving stale URLs
medium.fix: Improve isLikelyBankingOnlyApi function with more comprehensive pattern matching

medium.issue: Missing input validation in DEX order form
medium.why: Client-side validation exists but no server-side validation mentioned for order parameters
medium.fix: Add server-side validation for symbol, quantity, and price in order endpoints

medium.why: Credentials exposed in source code pose security risk and limit authentication flexibility
medium.fix: Move credentials to environment variables or configuration file

low.issue: Truncated runtime check output for markets endpoint
low.why: Large ETF catalog response gets truncated in audit logs, hiding potential data issues
low.fix: Implement pagination or response size limits for large datasets

low.why: Error display uses different color schemes across components (red vs yellow borders)
low.fix: Standardize error message styling across all components

regressions.evidence: npm.cmd run build returns exit code -1 with no output
Line 621 references undefined 'orderFor' variable instead of 'orderForm'

next_actions: Fix build process by investigating npm run build failure and resolving dependency issues
Add 2 missing ETF tokens to DEX_SEED_TOKENS array to reach expected count of 42
Consolidate API URL resolution logic into shared utility across all modules
Fix 'orderFor' typo in DexApp.jsx select element
Add comprehensive error handling and validation to dexApi.js request function
